trades.rationale: Q1 record revenue + defense contract wins; Citizens PT $95, Clear Street PT $98; stock up 7.9% on earnings day with further analyst upgrades; web-quoted $85 but filled at $99.03 due to price movement

notes: VIX 17.18, QQQ +0.79% pre-market, tech leading on earnings beats. Passed on DDOG (too extended after +29% yesterday). RKLB position slightly exceeds 10% cap ($11,624 = 11.6% of portfolio) due to fill price being higher than web-quoted price — position size risk noted. Stop-loss set at 5% trailing (~$94.08). Alpaca data API limited to IEX; used web search for prices.

no_trade_reason: RKLB Alpaca paper price ($99.47) already above analyst PT range ($95-98); DDOG at $194, above $180-185 watch zone. Conservative hold — capital preservation priority.
notes: VIX 17.18, QQQ +0.79%, market shrugging off Iran-US tensions. RKLB: record Q1 $200.3M revenue (+63.5% YoY), $2.2B backlog, largest launch deal ever, Motiv Space acquisition announced — thesis reinforced but Alpaca paper price above PTs. DDOG +5.9% today at $194, KeyBanc PT raised to $225 — too extended for new entry. Session 2 of day; no new capital deployed.

no_trade_reason: CPI release Tuesday May 12 creates significant uncertainty; oil surge (Brent +3.5% to $104-111) is inflationary risk; futures down 0.1%; RKLB at 12.3% of portfolio (above 10% cap, no add); preserving capital ahead of CPI data.
notes: VIX 17.19, futures -0.1% on Trump rejecting Iran peace proposal; Brent oil surging to $104-111. RKLB up 7.24% from entry ($99.03 -> $106.20, unrealized +$839); thesis validated by Needham and TD Cowen both raising PTs to $120 (from $90) on May 8-11. Airlines down on fuel costs; energy names (OXY, XOM, CVX) benefiting but CPI Tuesday prevents new entries. OXY ~$53 identified as next candidate post-CPI. DDOG on watchlist for pullback to $185-190.
